016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.jsonrpc;
017
018import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.BackpressureStrategy;
019import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Maybe;
020import io.reactivex.rxjava3.core.Observable;
021import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.ChainTip;
022import org.consensusj.bitcoin.jsonrpc.ChainTipClient;
023import org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.ChainTipService;
024import org.consensusj.rx.jsonrpc.RxJsonRpcClient;
025import org.reactivestreams.Publisher;
026import org.slf4j.Logger;
027import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
028
029/**
030 * Interface with {@link PollingChainTipService#pollForDistinctChainTip()} method.
031 * @deprecated Use the {@link PollingChainTipServiceImpl} implementation
032 */
033@Deprecated
034public interface PollingChainTipService extends ChainTipService, ChainTipClient, RxJsonRpcClient {
035    Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(PollingChainTipService.class);
036
037    /**
038     * Implement this method to provide a polling interval
039     *
040     * @return polling interval with desired frequency for polling for new ChainTips.
041     */
042    Observable<Long> getPollingInterval();
043
044    /**
045     * Using a polling interval provided by {@link PollingChainTipService#getPollingInterval()} provide a
046     * stream of distinct {@link ChainTip}s.
047     *
048     * @return A stream of distinct {@code ChainTip}s.
049     */
050    default Publisher<ChainTip> pollForDistinctChainTip() {
051        return getPollingInterval()
052                .doOnNext(t -> log.debug("got interval"))
053                .flatMapMaybe(t -> this.currentChainTipMaybe())
054                .doOnNext(tip -> log.debug("blockheight, blockhash = {}, {}", tip.getHeight(), tip.getHash()))
055                .distinctUntilChanged(ChainTip::getHash)
056                .doOnNext(tip -> log.info("** NEW ** blockheight, blockhash = {}, {}", tip.getHeight(), tip.getHash()))
057                // ERROR backpressure strategy is compatible with BehaviorProcessor since it subscribes to MAX items
058                .toFlowable(BackpressureStrategy.ERROR);
059    }
060
061    /**
062     * Get the active chain tip if there is one (useful for polling clients)
063     *
064     * @return The active ChainTip if available (onSuccess) otherwise onComplete (if not available) or onError (if error occurred)
065     */
066    private Maybe<ChainTip> currentChainTipMaybe() {
067        return pollOnceAsync(this::getChainTipsAsync)
068                .mapOptional(ChainTip::findActiveChainTip);
069    }
070}
